title: In a Riskier Era, China Bets on Technology to Resist U.S. Pressure
summary_full: China announced a 7 percent increase in military spending and a five-year plan to try to reduce its military and industry’s reliance on Western technology.
summary_public: China announced a 7 percent increase in military spending and a five-year plan to try to reduce its military and industry’s reliance on Western technology.
